org.apache.paimon.catalog

Interface CatalogLock

  • All Superinterfaces:
    AutoCloseable, Closeable
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    HiveCatalogLock

    @Public
public interface CatalogLock
extends Closeable
    An interface that allows source and sink to use global lock to some transaction-related things.
    Since:
    0.4.0

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Interface and Description
      static interface  CatalogLock.Factory
      Factory to create CatalogLock.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      <T> T runWithLock(String database, String table, Callable<T> callable)
      Run with catalog lock.

      • Methods inherited from interface java.io.Closeable

        close

    • Method Detail

      • runWithLock

        <T> T runWithLock(String database,
                  String table,
                  Callable<T> callable)
           throws Exception
        Run with catalog lock. The caller should tell catalog the database and table name.
        Throws:
        Exception
